subject: [PATCH v4 02/10] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying to ring

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers to a ring in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) io-uring implementation. It extracts the header copying into a new function called copy_header_to_ring(), which simplifies the code and centralizes error handling and rate-limited logging. The changes affect several functions in fs/fuse/dev_uring.c, making it easier to maintain and modify the code.
